The '''B4J4 security droid''' was a [[Blujay]]-developed security droid developed for the corporate sphere. It was armed with a pair of heavy [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] with a [[Stun/Legends|stun]] setting, a [[snare pistol]]<ref name="GOI" /> or two grapple-cable shooters firing [[ShrinCord]].<ref name="MtL" /> Its [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] generator enabled it to fly up stairs and navigate [[Turbolift/Legends|turbolift]] shafts.<ref name="GOI" /> It had a single [[Photoreceptor/Legends|eye]], and while it had keen [[Audio sensor/Legends|hearing]], it possessed no [[Olfactory sensor/Legends|olfactory sensors]] capable of following scents. While capable of following a clear trail of obvious signs such as [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] scorches, they were otherwise not very effective trackers.<ref name="MtL" /> The B4J4 security droids could be found guarding the headquarters of some of the most prestigious galactic corporations;<ref name="GOI" /> ten of these droids were used during non-work hours at [[Santhe/Sienar Headquarters Building]] to conduct random patrols.<ref name="MtL" />

It cost 25,340 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] new.<ref name="GOI" />
